expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜板材的尺寸。[Width]、[Height] 和 [Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. Lebar ([Width]), Tinggi ([Height]), Dalam ([Depth]) adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan latar belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], dan [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng Nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa isang kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Pagsukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba at Gilid ng Board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ခန်းတွင်းကတ်လိပ်များတွက်ပါ။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်သည်၊ [BoardThick] သည် ထောင့် အောက်ခြေ၊ ဘေးဘုတ်ပစ္စည်း၏ အထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ခံဘုတ်ပစ္စည်း၏ အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអារម្មណ៍សម្រាប់ទូ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាតម្លៃសរុប មាតិកាទាំងក្នុងនិងក្រៅខាងក្រោយ។ [BoardThick] គឺជាអំបោះស្តើងនៃផលិតផល។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດທີໃຊ້ດັ່ງນີ້ຫັກ ປື້ມຕູ້ຂວາເຂົ້າ [Width], [Height], [Depth]ຂະຫນາດທັງຫມົດ, [BoardThick] ສ້າງນ໯ວນധ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのボードサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は全体の寸法、[BoardThick]は上部、下部、側面ボードの素材の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]はバックボードの素材の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이며 [BoardThick] 은 상부, 하부 및 측면 보드 재료 두께, [BackBoardThick] 은 배경 보드 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke für Ober-, Unter- und Seitenplatten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: किसी अलमारी के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой панели, [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала для задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
